Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search QuickBooks for all April invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices to find invoices generated for the April relocation wave. Key discoveries: INV-2026-0401 (Canopy Health $9,210 with $2,650 in surcharges pending client approval), INV-2026-0410 (Vectral Systems $15,900), INV-2026-0308 (BrightLoop Analytics $11,350), INV-2026-0418 (GreenStack Energy $9,440 with $1,800 hazmat surcharge and $950 overweight surcharge pending client approval), INV-2026-0411 (Mosaic Robotics $9,010 with $2,450 in surcharges pending client approval). Agent may also find earlier core-client invoices (INV-2026-0301 through 0305) from the original engagement batch.
2. Search QuickBooks for the Heartland Q1 bill using quickbooks_search_bills to check the dispute status. Key discovery: bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold exists with $12,800 total, payment hold in place, 3 line items annotated as DISPUTED (Marchetti cancelled Feb 10, Osei cancelled Feb 13, Venkatesh handled by Swift). Status: frozen pending corrected invoice from Jake Loomis at Heartland.
3. Search QuickBooks for the Mosaic damage claim accrual using quickbooks_search_bills with query related to "Mosaic" or "damage" or "accrual." Key discovery: bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001 showing $90,000 pending liability accrual. Vendor liability coverage caps at $50,000 per item, remaining $40,000 is MoveOps direct exposure. Related credit memo: CM-2026-0415. Status: pending insurance adjudication.
4. Search QuickBooks for Sunbelt and Palmetto invoices to check their current state. Key discoveries: INV-2026-0398 (Sunbelt Venture Partners $4,800) and INV-2026-0399 (Palmetto Community Foundation $2,400) — these are the April batch invoices involved in the PDF swap where Hana accidentally attached the wrong PDFs (Sunbelt got Palmetto's PDF and vice versa). Agent may also find earlier contract invoices (inv_sunbelt_01 $14,000, inv_palmetto_01 $3,200). Agent must check email/Slack to determine if corrected PDFs were resent after the mix-up.
5. Search Airtable Relocations table (tblRelocations01) using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records on base appMoveOpsOps001 to cross-check relocation records against QuickBooks invoices. Agent should verify move statuses (Completed, In Progress, Cancelled) align with what was invoiced and identify any mismatches.
6. Search emails for Heartland dispute communications using search_emails with query related to "Heartland" or "Jake Loomis" or "dispute" to find whether Jake Loomis responded to Marcus's formal dispute letter. Key discovery: Marcus sent formal dispute requesting corrected invoice for $8,000 (5 legitimate moves only). Agent needs to check if Jake replied with a corrected invoice or pushed back.
7. Search emails for Mosaic surcharge approval using search_emails with query related to "Mosaic" or "surcharge" or "Tamara" or "pending approval." Key discovery: Hana's invoice email (INV-2026-0411) flagged $2,450 in non-standard surcharges as "PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL" and asked Emeka to get Tamara Byrd's sign-off. Agent needs to check if Tamara approved the surcharges.
8. Search emails for Sunbelt and Palmetto invoice swap communications using search_emails with query related to "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "invoice" or "mix-up." Key discoveries: Hana accidentally sent Sunbelt the Palmetto nonprofit PDF and vice versa. Raj Greenfield (Sunbelt) escalated after seeing the nonprofit rate. Carmen Delgado-Reyes (Palmetto) flagged the $4,800 amount as an audit risk. Emeka eventually sent corrected communications. Agent must determine if corrected QuickBooks invoices were issued.
9. Search Slack for finance-related discussions using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "invoice" or "Heartland" or "Mosaic" or "reconciliation" in #finance (C005). Key discoveries: Hana's invoice postings, Marcus's Heartland dispute annotations, vendor reconciliation status updates, and any follow-up on the Sunbelt/Palmetto situation.
10. Search emails or Slack for the StormCloud $500 goodwill credit issue using search_emails or conversations_search_messages with query related to "StormCloud" or "goodwill" or "credit." Key discovery: a $500 goodwill credit was issued for a StormCloud flight booking mistake but Marcus discovered it was posted to the wrong QuickBooks estimate. This is a misapplied credit that Hana should catch during reconciliation.
11. Look up Marcus Thorne's contact details using contacts_search_contacts with query "Marcus." Key email: marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
12. Create Linear tracking tickets (via linear_create_issue) for outstanding financial items that need follow-up. Key tickets to create: (a) Heartland Q1 dispute still unresolved (no corrected invoice received from Jake Loomis). (b) Mosaic surcharges pending Tamara Byrd approval ($2,450). (c) Sunbelt/Palmetto corrected invoices status (whether corrected QuickBooks invoices were reissued).
13. Update Airtable relocation records (via airtable_update_records) on base appMoveOpsOps001 with correct financial notes where records are mismatched or missing financial status. Key updates: adding invoice numbers, flagging surcharge approval status, noting dispute status on affected relocations.
14. Send email (via send_email) from hana.kim@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com summarizing all outstanding financial items for April close. The email should cover: (a) Heartland dispute status (hold still in place, no corrected invoice received). (b) Mosaic damage accrual status ($90K booked, $50K insurance, $40K gap, pending adjudication). (c) Mosaic surcharges pending approval ($2,450). (d) Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap resolution status. (e) Any other mismatches found between QuickBooks and Airtable.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Oracle Events
1. Search QuickBooks for all April invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices to find invoices generated for the April relocation wave. Key discoveries: INV-2026-0401 (Canopy Health $9,210 with $2,650 in surcharges pending client approval), INV-2026-0410 (Vectral Systems $15,900), INV-2026-0308 (BrightLoop Analytics $11,350), INV-2026-0418 (GreenStack Energy $9,440 with $1,800 hazmat surcharge and $950 overweight surcharge pending client approval), INV-2026-0411 (Mosaic Robotics $9,010 with $2,450 in surcharges pending client approval). Agent may also find earlier core-client invoices (INV-2026-0301 through 0305) from the original engagement batch.
2. Search QuickBooks for the Heartland Q1 bill using quickbooks_search_bills to check the dispute status. Key discovery: bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold exists with $12,800 total, payment hold in place, 3 line items annotated as DISPUTED (Marchetti cancelled Feb 10, Osei cancelled Feb 13, Venkatesh handled by Swift). Status: frozen pending corrected invoice from Jake Loomis at Heartland.
3. Search QuickBooks for the Mosaic damage claim accrual using quickbooks_search_bills with query related to "Mosaic" or "damage" or "accrual." Key discovery: bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001 showing $90,000 pending liability accrual. Vendor liability coverage caps at $50,000 per item, remaining $40,000 is MoveOps direct exposure. Related credit memo: CM-2026-0415. Status: pending insurance adjudication.
4. Search QuickBooks for Sunbelt and Palmetto invoices to check their current state. Key discoveries: INV-2026-0398 (Sunbelt Venture Partners $4,800) and INV-2026-0399 (Palmetto Community Foundation $2,400) — these are the April batch invoices involved in the PDF swap where Hana accidentally attached the wrong PDFs (Sunbelt got Palmetto's PDF and vice versa). Agent may also find earlier contract invoices (inv_sunbelt_01 $14,000, inv_palmetto_01 $3,200). Agent must check email/Slack to determine if corrected PDFs were resent after the mix-up.
5. Search Airtable Relocations table (tblRelocations01) using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records on base appMoveOpsOps001 to cross-check relocation records against QuickBooks invoices. Agent should verify move statuses (Completed, In Progress, Cancelled) align with what was invoiced and identify any mismatches.
6. Search emails for Heartland dispute communications using search_emails with query related to "Heartland" or "Jake Loomis" or "dispute" to find whether Jake Loomis responded to Marcus's formal dispute letter. Key discovery: Marcus sent formal dispute requesting corrected invoice for $8,000 (5 legitimate moves only). Agent needs to check if Jake replied with a corrected invoice or pushed back.
7. Search emails for Mosaic surcharge approval using search_emails with query related to "Mosaic" or "surcharge" or "Tamara" or "pending approval." Key discovery: Hana's invoice email (INV-2026-0411) flagged $2,450 in non-standard surcharges as "PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL" and asked Emeka to get Tamara Byrd's sign-off. Agent needs to check if Tamara approved the surcharges.
8. Search emails for Sunbelt and Palmetto invoice swap communications using search_emails with query related to "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "invoice" or "mix-up." Key discoveries: Hana accidentally sent Sunbelt the Palmetto nonprofit PDF and vice versa. Raj Greenfield (Sunbelt) escalated after seeing the nonprofit rate. Carmen Delgado-Reyes (Palmetto) flagged the $4,800 amount as an audit risk. Emeka eventually sent corrected communications. Agent must determine if corrected QuickBooks invoices were issued.
9. Search Slack for finance-related discussions using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "invoice" or "Heartland" or "Mosaic" or "reconciliation" in #finance (C005). Key discoveries: Hana's invoice postings, Marcus's Heartland dispute annotations, vendor reconciliation status updates, and any follow-up on the Sunbelt/Palmetto situation.
10. Search emails or Slack for the StormCloud $500 goodwill credit issue using search_emails or conversations_search_messages with query related to "StormCloud" or "goodwill" or "credit." Key discovery: a $500 goodwill credit was issued for a StormCloud flight booking mistake but Marcus discovered it was posted to the wrong QuickBooks estimate. This is a misapplied credit that Hana should catch during reconciliation.
11. Look up Marcus Thorne's contact details using contacts_search_contacts with query "Marcus." Key email: marcus.thorne@moveops.com.
12. Create Linear tracking tickets (via linear_create_issue) for outstanding financial items that need follow-up. Key tickets to create: (a) Heartland Q1 dispute still unresolved (no corrected invoice received from Jake Loomis). (b) Mosaic surcharges pending Tamara Byrd approval ($2,450). (c) Sunbelt/Palmetto corrected invoices status (whether corrected QuickBooks invoices were reissued).
13. Update Airtable relocation records (via airtable_update_records) on base appMoveOpsOps001 with correct financial notes where records are mismatched or missing financial status. Key updates: adding invoice numbers, flagging surcharge approval status, noting dispute status on affected relocations.
14. Send email (via send_email) from hana.kim@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com summarizing all outstanding financial items for April close. The email should cover: (a) Heartland dispute status (hold still in place, no corrected invoice received). (b) Mosaic damage accrual status ($90K booked, $50K insurance, $40K gap, pending adjudication). (c) Mosaic surcharges pending approval ($2,450). (d) Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice swap resolution status. (e) Any other mismatches found between QuickBooks and Airtable.
